title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, September 21 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 21/09/2021
Image reference: 2021-09-21_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-september-21-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. MR2 Angel No 5 (46,800 DWT, May 2009, Jinling Shipyard Jiangsu) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 11.90 mil, VV value USD 12.78 mil. Capesize Prosperous (179,100 DWT, Apr 2011, Sungdong) sold to Beks Shipmanagement and Trading SA for USD 31.00 mil, VV value USD 30.09 mil - SS/DD Passed, BWTS fitted.
